title: Villager Inventory
description: Gives the already existing Villager inventory a GUI to interact with, by Crouching when right clicking it.
body:
A small mod that uses Mcreator to add a GUI linked to the Villagers **already existing**   
Inventory, mainly for the use of Giving it food to Breed.

Simplify Hold Shift/Crouch, and Right Click the Villager. and it'll open the GUI.

 

Sadly this is however **both Client and Server side**, so all players will need to have it installed.

**Server Side:** so that players can Right Click the Villager and open the Inventory

**Client Side:** so that the game knows how to render the Inventory.
